title: More Properties (Widget Properties)
text: More Properties (Widget Properties) Specify the properties of the current widget. The parameters displayed are initially supplied by Uniface as default parameters for the widget, or are specified in your system initialization file. Note: Not all widgets have additional properties that can be set in this form. Fields Widget Parameter Parameter Value How to Click the appropriate New or Delete buttons to add or remove a property. Related Links Widget Reference: Forms and Reports Widgets in Form components determine the appearance and behavior of fields, labels, occurrences, and entities in components running on Windows.
